name: Hobby Collection | Full-Stack Gallery
detail: A full-stack React and Go application for managing collectible inventories, featuring secure JWT authentication, PostgreSQL storage, and optimized media delivery via Cloudinary.

name: Hobby Collection Test Suites
detail: An automated test suite for Hobby Collection, utlizing Playwright for E2E and API testing, and k6 for performance testing, ensuring robust application reliability and performance under various scenarios.

name: Ama3 Bot | AI-Powered Discord Bot
detail: An AI-integrated Discord bot designed for lightweight, contextual interaction with users, leveraging structured prompt logic to generate responsive and adaptive conversational behavior.
